description: Worst suggested workflow ever. Parent says 'consider authoring R.A.M.I. agency-cohort.' I walk the corpus. The agency node ALREADY EXISTS. Canonical name right in the title: 'The Agency (R.A.M.I.)'. Fourteen cards already attached. Parent's brief would have me double-author. I refuse to double-author and instead make the actual missing edge: Agency Coroner (MKM-75) was sync-drift-orphaned — name literally contains 'Agency,' card-internal trivia already states 'the coroner is an agent of R.A.M.I.,' yet the card had no characters: frontmatter and the agency node's appears_on list did not include it. One stack-attach to fix. The parent-dispatch-verify discipline working as designed; receipts in final-report.
citations: [Scryfall: MKM-75 Agency Coroner — name and oracle text]
[in-MD trivia bullet, 75-agency-coroner.md line 78: 'The card's name is literal — the coroner is an agent of R.A.M.I.']
[Wizards.com: A First Look at Murders at Karlov Manor]
[MTG Wiki: Ravnican Agency of Magicological Investigations]
other_candidates_considered: Basilica Stalker (MKM-78) attach to agency — REFUSED. Vampire DETECTIVE subtype is suggestive, but the figure depicted is a predator descending in a mask over an Orzhov sun-medallion floor; trivia frames it as Orzhov-vampiric-enforcer-stalking-the-basilica. Agency node's own Exit-Specialist caveat applies: Disguise is used by both Agency operatives AND the criminal-side characters the Agency hunts. Without flavor-text Agency attribution, this card reads as either Agency-side or criminal-side. Pending MKM-story-article confirmation. Future-watch.

Repeat Offender (MKM-101) attach to agency — REFUSED. Card depicts a SUSPECT (wanted poster in art, flavor 'Blasted sketch artist did too good a job. Looks like it's time for me to lie low'). This is criminal-side, not Agency-side. Agency is the institution that ISSUES the wanted poster, not the figure DODGING it. Repeat Offender's correct future edge is to the suspect symbol node (its oracle text self-suspects), but that's a separate edge for a separate invocation — and even then it's a judgment call since the current suspect-symbol appears_on roster is creatures that ADD or REMOVE suspect status, not creatures that USE it. Deferred.

Agency Coroner attach to suspect symbol — DEFERRED. Coroner's oracle CONSUMES suspect status (double-draw if sacrificed creature was suspected) but does not add or remove it. Different relationship than the existing 5 appears_on cards. One decision per invocation; this stays for a future Edgelord pass to judge whether 'suspect-payoff' is the same edge as 'suspect-application.'
next_pass_suggestions: Resolve Basilica Stalker (MKM-78) Agency-vs-criminal-side disambiguation via MKM story articles. If story canon confirms it's an Agency Vampire Detective on assignment, attach to agency. If criminal-side, do not attach.

Audit other MKM cards for the same sync-drift class: corpus has 87 MKM-set cards, agency node lists 14 (now 15) appears_on, and at least Agency Outfitter / Exit Specialist / Cerebral Confiscation / Person of Interest / Offender at Large / Eliminate the Impossible — wait, several of those ARE already on the list. Run a fresh `grep -L 'characters:' cards/magic-the-gathering/murders-at-karlov-manor/*.md` against the agency node roster to surface missing-frontmatter cases like this Coroner one.

Consider whether `detective-creature-type` deserves a symbol node (the agency node's own caveat 4 flags this as a future candidate); 85+ Scryfall prints across MKM and reprints would clear threshold easily. Mr. Nodeley's territory, not Edgelord's.
parent_brief_verification: Parent's claim 'R.A.M.I. agency-cohort candidate may meet threshold (Coroner, Stalker, Repeat Offender)' is structurally wrong on premise: the agency node already exists with R.A.M.I. as the canonical primary identifier. Parent appears to have surfaced a triviabot mention without verifying node-existence (bbl-parent-dispatch-verify memory applies). The correct read of the triviabot signal was 'three MKM cards lack characters: frontmatter pointing at the existing agency node' — sync-drift, not node-creation. Of the three named, only Agency Coroner is a clean attach. Receipts above.
